description: Per-STING-category indicative electrical load (VA per placed unit) + a density hint (1 per N m2) for the Matrix Place feature. Drives (a) the live estimated-load column shown BEFORE placement (M7) and (b) the area-based cell auto-suggest (M1). These are SEED / indicative values for a place-first-calculate-later workflow, NOT a substitute for the real per-panel load calc: after placement the matrix chains to ElecLoadSummary / LightingPowerDensity / DemandFactorReport which read the actual placed families' connector loads. Override per project at <project>/_BIM_COORD/category_load_defaults.json (same shape; entries layer over this baseline by category name).
notes: loadVaPerUnit: indicative apparent power (VA) per placed instance, used only for the pre-placement estimate column. 0 = non-electrical / source (panels, sprinklers, sanitaryware).
loadType: 'lighting' rolls into the lighting sub-total (and the LPD cross-check); 'power' into small-power; 'mech' into mechanical; 'none' excluded.
suggestPerAreaM2: area density hint (1 fixture per N m2) used to pre-fill a cell as an editable starting point. 0 = no auto-suggest (user types the count).
Values are engineering seeds (BS 7671 small-power diversity, EN 12464 lighting density, typical LED panel wattage) — tune per project.
